keywords: fail open fraud detection service unavailable allow purchase audit event FraudCheckFailed inline
ironRules: T113 is @Injectable() only — no @EventPattern, no @MessagePattern (inline, called by T99)
When F283 is unavailable: allow purchase (return { passed: true }) AND emit FraudCheckFailed(service_unavailable)
Three conditions required simultaneously: try/catch, allow-on-catch, emit audit event
Any catch path returning { passed: false } is a BUILD_FAILURE per CF-09-2
